# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-deployment
  labels:
    app: microservice
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: microservice
        image: microservice:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080

---

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: microservice
  labels:
    app: microservice
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    name: http
  selector:
    app: microservice
